title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 442.320 - Certificate to recite evidence required by section 442.310
text:
442.320.  Certificate to recite evidence required by section 442.310. — The certificate of such proof shall set forth the names of the witnesses examined, and their places of residence, the fact that such witnesses were sworn, and the evidence required by section 442.310 to be by them given.
(RSMo 1939 § 3423) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3036; 1919 § 2195; 1909 § 2806
